creator: mvh@ix.netcom.com
text:
Kill it off if you like, but you can update it until
you decide what to do.  It's just the name, not
the actual package.

- Mike H.

   Date: Wed, 2 Jun 1999 10:30:01 +0100
   From: Tom Hukins <tom@eborcom.com>
   Cc: freebsd-gnats-submit@freebsd.org
   Content-Type: text/plain; charset=us-ascii
   X-RULES: lists

   On Mon, May 31, 1999 at 02:51:08PM -0700, mvh@ix.netcom.com wrote:
   > 
   > >Number:         11967
   > >Category:       ports
   > >Synopsis:       p5-Apache port out of date

   Please see ports/10385, which contains a proposal for an
   apache13-modperl port and an explanation of why I think p5-Apache
   should be killed off.

   It seems a shame that there are two separate efforts to create an
   Apache+mod_perl port. Of course, if p5-Apache is considered
   superior, I'll gladly accept that decision.

   Tom
